name: governance-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for governance-sdk and governance-sdk-platform. This package is not published — see packages/governance for the core SDK.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/governance && npm run build -w packages/governance-platform
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/governance && npm test -w packages/governance-platform
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/governance && npm run lint -w packages/governance-platform
